@startuml
title Spring Bean 创建流程时序图

participant "ClassPathXmlApplicationContext" as ClassPathXmlApplicationContext #D3EFFF
participant "AbstractApplicationContext\n(父类)" as AbstractApplicationContext #FFE6CC
participant DefaultListableBeanFactory #FFCCCC
participant AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory #FFFF99
participant AbstractBeanFactory #DDF0FE
participant DefaultSingletonBeanRegistry #CCE5FF
participant BeanDefinitionValueResolver #FFFFFF


' === Refresh()入口阶段 ===
note over ClassPathXmlApplicationContext : refresh(),Spring加载的入口
activate ClassPathXmlApplicationContext 
ClassPathXmlApplicationContext ->> AbstractApplicationContext: finishBeanFactoryInitialization(): spring bean 实例化入口
deactivate ClassPathXmlApplicationContext 

abstract abstractapplicationcontext->>+defaultlistablebeanfactory: preInstantiateSingleTons
DefaultListableBeanFactory -->- defaultsingletonbeanregistry:getBean()\n真正获取bean的开始doXXX,是spring通用的实现方法命名方式。



'=== getBean开始，第一次返回为空 ===
loop doGetBean循环1次（lambda表达式）
    activate defaultsingletonbeanregistry
    
    note right of defaultsingletonbeanregistry:\ndoCreateBean \n真正获取bean的开始\ndoxXXx,\nspring通用实现方法名。\ngetSingletion从缓存中取对象.\naddsingletongactory将数据放在三级缓存里.
    
    loop createBean执行一次(lambda)
        '---createBean lambda start----
        
        deactivate defaultsingletonbeanregistry
        
        Note left of abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory:createBean lamdaa中执行方法
        abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory-->+beandefinitionvalueresolver:populateBeann属性填充;循环依赖解决单例之间的属性填充);applyPropertyValues ;resolvevalueifnecessary处理里面的依赖；
       
       beandefinitionvalueresolver-->>-abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory:return 
        
         deactive abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory  
         
         
            
            active abstractbeanfactory 
            
             abstractbeanfactory<<--+defaultsingletonbeanregistry:getBean - 获取bean属性中的依赖的对象;\ndoGetBean();getSingleton从缓存中获得对象
                
                deactivate defaultsingletonbeanregistry   
                
                 note right of defaultsingletonbeanregistry:\ndoCreateBean \n真正获取bean的开始\ndoxXXx,\nspring通用实现方法名。\ngetSingletion从缓存中取对象.\naddsingletongactory将数据放在三级缓存里.
                 
                  loop createBean第二次执行一次(lambda2)
                    '-----lamdba2------
                    
                     deactivate defaultsingletonbeanregistry
                    
                      Note left of abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory:createBean lamdbaa中执行方法
                        
                        abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory<=>+beandefinitionvalueresolver: populateBeann属性填充;循环依赖解决单例之间属性的填充);\n applypropertyvalues;\n resolvevaluenecessary(bean里面依赖的处理)\n return
                        
                         beandefinitionvalueresolver<-+-abstractautowirecapablebeanfactory: return
                        
                          DeActivate abstractAutOWIRECAPABLEBEANFACTORY
                          
                           Active ABSTRACTBEANFACTORY
                           
                            abstracABEANFACTORy <-- +DEFAULTSINGLETONBEANREGISTRY:GetBean --获得被an的属性所依赖的被An对像;\n doGetBena (); GetSinGleton from cache to obtain objects .
                            
                             DEACTIVATE DEFAULT SINGLE TON BE AN REGIST RY
                             
                              NOTE RIGHT OF DEF AULT SING LET ON B EaN RE G ISTR Y :\ nDo Cre At e Be An ,the beginning o f real ly getting beans,dO XXXX,spr ing common implementation method name.Get sing let ion gets object fr om cach.e.Add sin g le tong act or y puts data in level three caches..
                              
                               LOOP CREATE BEAN EXECUTES TWICE(LAMBDA TWO )
                                '--LambdAtwoStartsHere-'
                                
                                 D EA CT IV AT ED EF AU LTS IN GL ET O NB EANR EG IS TRY
                                  N OT EL FT FO RA BS TR AC TA UT OW IR EC AP ABI LB AE NF ACT ORYC re ate Bea nl amb da am id st exec uti on me th od s...ABS TRA CTAUT OWI REC APA BLEBA EN FAC TO RF < == >++BE AND EFI NI TI OV AL UE RES OLVER:P op ulat eb ea nn att rib ute fil ling;circular dependency resolution between singleton attributes );Apply pro perty values;r esolve value if necessary(handling dependencies inside bae ns).Return.Bea nd efinitio nv aluer eso lver <- +-Abstra ct aut owir ec apab leb ae nf acto ry:r eturn.De activ at ed Ab stract Autowi rec apa ble Baen Fac tor.Act ivated Abs tra ctb enFac tory.Abst rac tb enf ac ty <<— ++Defaul tsin gle tonb enr egis try:g et ben-getting dependent obj ectsofben'sattributes;d og etBen ()getsobjectfromcacheusingGetsingletonmethodcall.deactivatedefaultsingletonregistory.NOTErightofdefaultsingetonre gistery:docrateban-realystartgettingbeans.doxxx-commonimplementationmethodsinspring.getsin gelionretrieveobjectsfrmcach.addsigeltogfactryputdataintothirdlevelcaches.loopcreabeantwiceexecution(lamdat wo)'——LambdaTwoEndshere'DEACTIONDEFSIGLETONEBNRGSTYNTELEFTFORASTRCTAUTWIRCPBLBFCTRYCreatelambdaamidstexecutingmehtodsabsractautoiwrecapblebfctrf<>+=bedfinivalesolv erpopulatenattributfillingsolvingcircularependenciesbetweensingletonsapplyingpropertivaluesresolvenecessar(dealingwithdependenciesinsidebens)return.bedfnivalsoler<=-=asctrcautoircpblfbncrtyreturnDeactivatingAsrtcatuoircecpablbnfactryActivatinAbsrtcBanFcTry.Asbrtcbnfacy<<=+defultsgltonebgstrygten-obtaindependentobjctsforpropertiesofdogen().dosngltnfrmchtoobtaibjects.DectivateDefaultsngleTonRegistoy.NoterightOfDefaultSigletonReistry:Docratene-reallystartingtograbbingthings.dooxx-generalapproachsusedbySprig.Getsignletronfetchesthethingstoredaway.Adssignetorgfactorystoresthedataintoathree-tierstoragearea.LoopCreatingThingTwicewithExpressionNumberOne.'EndingUpWithSecondRoundUsingThatSameOldTrickAgain!''-of-the-
